metadata.conversion_model: visual-semantic approximation from prettymaps Matplotlib styles to OpenMapTiles/MapLibre layers
conversion_warnings: Layer 'perimeter' is ignored because MapLibre styles do not define map bounds.
Layer 'green' uses prettymaps key 'hatch', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'green' uses prettymaps key 'hatch_c', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'beach' uses prettymaps key 'hatch', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'beach' uses prettymaps key 'hatch_c', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'building' uses a palette; MapLibre output uses the first palette color for deterministic styling.
Layer 'sea' uses prettymaps key 'hatch', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'sea' uses prettymaps key 'hatch_c', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'water' uses prettymaps key 'hatch', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'water' uses prettymaps key 'hatch_c', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'waterway' uses prettymaps key 'hatch', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
Layer 'waterway' uses prettymaps key 'hatch_c', which is only partially supported or unsupported in MapLibre.
metadata.description: A Japanese woodblock-print inspired OpenFreeMap/MapLibre style with Prussian-blue water, washi-paper land, indigo linework, vermilion accents, and sprite-based printed textures.
